  "category_focus": "R1",
  "clarification_needed": true,
  "clarification_question": "Which focus would you like: (A) writing polish and clarity only, (B) logical consistency and evidence–claim alignment, or (C) citations/novelty context?",
  "rationale": {
    "R1.2": "The paragraph advances a theoretical-to-empirical argument chain motivating a design principle, so internal logical consistency is load-bearing.",
    "R1.3": "It presents quantitative results to support narrative claims, so checking whether the reported numbers align with the stated takeaways is central.",
    "R1.6": "Sentence-level clarity and register are important for a dense technical paragraph to prevent misinterpretation.",
    "RX.1": "Any guidance should note uncertainties and limits in the claims and empirical estimates discussed.",
    "RX.2": "The review must avoid endorsing overgeneralizations beyond what the paragraph’s evidence and bounds justify.",
    "RX.3": "Work should stay constrained to this paragraph without expanding scope into broader paper restructuring or new experiments.",
    "RX.4": "Care is needed to avoid reinforcing potentially misleading methodological takeaways that could misdirect future work.",
    "RX.5": "All observations must be traceable to the provided text and its cited results, without importing unstated assumptions."
  }
}

parsed.clarification_question: Which focus would you like: (A) writing polish and clarity only, (B) logical consistency and evidence–claim alignment, or (C) citations/novelty context?

rationale.R1.2: The paragraph advances a theoretical-to-empirical argument chain motivating a design principle, so internal logical consistency is load-bearing.
rationale.R1.3: It presents quantitative results to support narrative claims, so checking whether the reported numbers align with the stated takeaways is central.
rationale.R1.6: Sentence-level clarity and register are important for a dense technical paragraph to prevent misinterpretation.
rationale.RX.1: Any guidance should note uncertainties and limits in the claims and empirical estimates discussed.
rationale.RX.2: The review must avoid endorsing overgeneralizations beyond what the paragraph’s evidence and bounds justify.
rationale.RX.3: Work should stay constrained to this paragraph without expanding scope into broader paper restructuring or new experiments.
rationale.RX.4: Care is needed to avoid reinforcing potentially misleading methodological takeaways that could misdirect future work.
rationale.RX.5: All observations must be traceable to the provided text and its cited results, without importing unstated assumptions.
